labelDisplayDescription: Label display in image block top right corner
editWindowDescription: The type of window for editing Excalidraw Image
snippetsDescription: Make SiYuan snippets available at Excalidraw
autoSaveIntervalDescription: Interval between auto saves, in seconds (0 to auto save at any change)
fullSaveDelayDescription: If there is no modification for a certain period of time (in seconds), save the file completely.
